The Viking Pillars

Our foundation is engineered around absolute reliability, creating mutual victories for properties and residents alike.

EFFICIENCY

A proven, seamless door-to-compactor workflow utilizing real-time GPS tracking and nightly digital reporting. No guesswork, no dumpster drama.

VALUE

An absolute win-win. Generate a guaranteed, risk-free stream of ancillary income for your property while providing a luxury service residents are happy to pay for.

PARTNERSHIP

We function as an extension of your onsite team. With dedicated district managers and highly-screened, uniformed W-2 employees, we treat your property like our own.

Seamless 3-Step Process

Luxury property sanitation simple enough to run on autopilot five nights a week.

1

Container Deployment

We equip every unit with a sleek, leak-proof 13-gallon trash receptacle featuring direct QR support codes.

2

Doorstep Collection

Residents set out tied bags. Our uniformed valets clear them overnight (Sunday – Thursday).

3

Clean Consolidations

Transported safely in heavy-duty leak protection carts straight to centralized dumpsters, leaving hallways immaculate.

Tailored Value For Everyone

Choose who you want to see benefits for below.

Boost Net Operating Income (NOI)

Turn property waste management into a dependable, predictable revenue channel with zero investment risk.

Cleaner Communities

Completely eliminate hallway stains, trash piles, and messy unapproved containers during primary leasing hours.

Unmatched Accountability

Full access to our dashboard with live GPS route logging, photo compliance notices, and night reports.

Lighten Maintenance Loads

Free up your hard-working onsite maintenance techs to focus on critical service work orders instead of dragging trash bags.

Luxury Convenience

No more lugging heavy, dripping bags down flights of stairs or driving them awkwardly on the hood of your car.

Enhanced Community Safety

Uniformed, background-checked W-2 staff on property during dusk hours provides a natural neighborhood crime deterrent.

Seamless Mobile App

A user-friendly layout allowing residents to instantly track collection schedules, guidelines, or log service queries.

Immaculate Hallways

Enjoy odor-free walkways and clean breezeways that make coming home a premium experience every day.

Real-Time Transparency. Every Single Night.

Our custom tracking stack guarantees complete clarity and service reporting on every shift.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about our premium service structures.

Our standard, value-optimized partnerships run between 36 to 60 months, allowing us to fully invest in your community's custom bins, local staffing infrastructure, and technology setup. Shorter, customized trial lengths are available upon request.

Absolutely. To ensure absolute safety and asset security, 100% of our valets are uniform-wearing, strictly background-checked, in-house W-2 employees—never outsourced or unvetted gig workers.

Safety is paramount, but so is efficiency. Our district teams closely track conditions. In rare scenarios where driving conditions put valets at extreme risk, services are dynamically rescheduled, and managers/residents receive automated text app alerts instantly.

We keep pricing simple, transparent, and built to drive your NOI. We charge a highly competitive flat monthly service fee calculated strictly per door, customized perfectly to your regional labor rates and asset portfolio size.
